observedSurfaces.evidence: The launcher now starts in the gameplay view and can switch to automap on demand.
Opening gameplay window. Use Tab to switch to the automap.
Tab: toggle gameplay view and automap

explicitNullSurfaces.evidence: The allowed launch surface creates a gameplay session directly; no menu command path is exposed.
explicitNullSurfaces.reason: No current path in the allowed files routes New Game -> episode -> skill -> E1M1 start.

explicitNullSurfaces.evidence: The allowed read scope exposes no episode-select menu implementation or call site.
explicitNullSurfaces.reason: Episode selection is required for the vanilla menu-to-E1M1 route but is absent from the visible launch surface.

explicitNullSurfaces.evidence: The allowed read scope exposes no menu controller module or menu event handler.
explicitNullSurfaces.reason: No menu controller surface is visible from the selected step's exact read scope.

explicitNullSurfaces.evidence: The allowed read scope exposes no menu renderer or title/menu first frame surface.
explicitNullSurfaces.reason: No menu render surface is visible from the selected step's exact read scope.

explicitNullSurfaces.evidence: src/main.ts transitions from launcher resources to createLauncherSession and runLauncherWindow without a menu state.
explicitNullSurfaces.reason: No menu-state transition into E1M1 is visible before gameplay session creation.

explicitNullSurfaces.evidence: The target command is bun run doom.ts, but the visible current package start script is bun run src/main.ts.
explicitNullSurfaces.reason: The root command contract that should own the final launch path is not implemented in this read scope.

explicitNullSurfaces.evidence: The allowed read scope exposes no skill-select menu implementation or call site.
explicitNullSurfaces.reason: Skill selection is required for the vanilla menu-to-E1M1 route but is absent from the visible launch surface.

packageJson.description: Vanilla Doom parity engine built on Bun FFI and @bun-win32 bindings.
